adsorption.raw_only: Showing raw adsorption energy only; no ZPE, entropy, or solvent corrections are included.
adsorption.title: Adsorption Energy
app.title: VASP Local Workflow MVP
draft.caption: Task ID: {task_id} | Task type: {task_type} | Species order: {species}
error.invalid_kpoints_count: KPOINTS grid must contain exactly three integers.
error.invalid_kpoints_positive: KPOINTS grid values must be positive integers.
info.upload_generate: Upload a structure file in the left sidebar and generate a draft.
language.label: Language
monitor.title: Run Monitor
results.title: Results
stop.confirm: I confirm stopping the entire process group for this task
stop.title: Stop Task
vaspkit.bin.help: Path to the VASPKIT executable or command name; it is not called in dry_run mode.
vaspkit.bin.label: VASPKIT executable path
vaspkit.common_incar_key.help: Select one common VASPKIT INCAR key; advanced combinations can be entered below.
vaspkit.common_incar_key.label: Common calculation type
vaspkit.generation_mode.help: This phase only saves the generation request draft; it does not call real VASPKIT.
vaspkit.generation_mode.label: Generation mode
vaspkit.generator.title: VASPKIT Input Generator
vaspkit.option.accuracy_preset.help: Based on VASPKIT warm tips: Gamma-only, Low, Medium, Fine, or Custom.
vaspkit.option.accuracy_preset.label: Accuracy preset
vaspkit.option.custom_element_order.help: Required when custom order mode is selected. Separate element symbols with spaces.
vaspkit.option.element_order_mode.help: Use VASPKIT default element order, or specify a custom order such as O Ce P.
vaspkit.option.element_order_mode.label: Element order mode
vaspkit.option.existing_potcar_policy.he: Choose what to do if POTCAR already exists in run/: skip, backup and regenerate, or fail.
vaspkit.option.incar_custom_key_string.h: Allows combined strings such as STH6D3, SRD3, or STPU; only VASPKIT menu keys may be concatenated.
vaspkit.option.incar_key_parameters.help: Maps to VASPKIT 101 presets such as SR, ST, D3, H6, and others.
vaspkit.option.kmesh_resolved_value.help: In units of 2π/Å; the test record used 0.04, and 0.03-0.04 is generally precise enough.
vaspkit.option.kmesh_scheme.help: Maps to VASPKIT K-Mesh Scheme menu choices 1/2/3.
vaspkit.option.kmesh_scheme.label: K-mesh scheme
vaspkit.option.potcar_mode.help: 103 uses the recommended default potential; 104 is user specified and reserved behind whitelist protection.
vaspkit.option.potcar_mode.label: POTCAR generation mode
vaspkit.option.uploaded_cif.help: The source structure uploaded by the user; the VASPKIT main flow accepts CIF only in this phase.
vaspkit.option.uploaded_cif.label: Uploaded CIF file
vaspkit.potcar_no_full_preview: Safety limit: full POTCAR preview is forbidden; only a summary is shown.
vaspkit.section.incar.help: Use VASPKIT 101 key-parameters to generate INCAR.
vaspkit.section.incar.label: INCAR
vaspkit.section.kpoints.help: Use VASPKIT 102 to generate KPOINTS for SCF calculations.
vaspkit.section.kpoints.label: KPOINTS
vaspkit.section.poscar.help: Use VASPKIT 105 to generate POSCAR from CIF, with default or custom element order.
vaspkit.section.poscar.label: POSCAR / CIF to POSCAR
vaspkit.section.potcar.help: Use VASPKIT 103/104 to generate POTCAR; all real paths must remain whitelist-controlled.
vaspkit.section.potcar.label: POTCAR
warning.adsorption_missing: Missing TOTEN values for adsorption energy: {fields}
warning.potcar_not_generated: Real POTCAR was not generated. dry_run keeps POTCAR.placeholder only.
